executive_board.name: Matthew Boyle
executive_board.bio: Matthew Boyle is a junior Finance major in the Smeal College of Business from Ellicott City, MD. He currently serves as the President in the Nittany Lion Fund after previously serving as a Director of NLF Education. This summer, Matthew will be interning at Evercore in the Investment Banking Division. In his free time, Matthew enjoys golfing, cooking, and hanging out with friends and family. He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him strengthen his analytical skills and ability to perform under pressure.

executive_board.name: Ben Urwin
executive_board.bio: Ben Urwin is a sophomore Finance major in the Smeal College of Business from Salt Lake City, UT. He currently serves as the Chief Investment Officer in the Nittany Lion Fund after previously serving as a Lead Analyst in the Financials Sector. This summer, Ben will be interning at Baird in the Investment Banking Division. In his free time, Ben enjoys golfing, skiing, and hanging out with friends and family. He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him develop the strong work ethic and financial knowledge necessary to succeed in finance.

executive_board.name: Joshua Yglesias
executive_board.bio: Joshua Yglesias is a junior Finance major in the Smeal College of Business from Miami, FL. He currently serves as the VP of External Operations in the Nittany Lion Fund after previously serving as the Lead Analyst of the Consumer Discretionary Sector. This summer, Joshua will be interning at Rothschild & Co in the Global Advisory Division. In his free time, Joshua enjoys golfing, soccer, and spending time with friends and family. He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him develop strong public speaking and communication skills.

executive_board.name: Ryan (RJ) De Marco
executive_board.bio: Ryan (RJ) De Marco is a junior Finance and Economics major in the Smeal College of Business and College of the Liberal Arts from Medford, NJ. He currently serves as the VP of Internal Operations in the Nittany Lion Fund after previously serving as the Lead Analyst of the Real Estate Sector. This summer, RJ will be interning at Lazard in the Financial Advisory Division. In his free time, RJ enjoys golfing and spending time with family and friends. He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him develop strong financial analysis skills and instill higher levels of accountability.

In his free time, Joseph enjoys exercising, watching sports, and spending time with friends and family. He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him develop a strong analytical mindset and the ability to think critically in high-pressure situations.

He says that the Nittany Lion Fund has helped him develop the ability to think about the stock market in a big picture manner while simultaneously developing his personal accountability and time management skills.
